message:
🌱 Temporarily remove Copilot DCO GHA for testing (#3686)

Testing if Prow trusted_apps is working.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
